channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: West Bengal CM launches industrial policy reforms to boost manufacturing
item.description: West Bengal Chief Minister Subhendu Adhikary has announced the formation of a four-member committee, led by new Industries Minister Tapas Ray, to draft a new industrial policy aimed at revitalizing th...

item.title: Survey shows Governor Isaac Mutuma leads Meru gubernatorial race ahead of 2027 elections
item.description: A recent Timely Kenya survey indicates that Meru Governor Isaac Mutuma is currently leading the race for the 2027 gubernatorial election, positioning him as the frontrunner in a closely contested poli...

item.title: Tech Billionaire Accuses Pope of Supporting Chinese Communist Interests in AI Regulation
item.description: Right-wing tech billionaire Peter Thiel has accused Pope Leo XIV of acting as a 'Chinese communist agent' for criticizing artificial intelligence (AI) in a 42,000-word encyclical. Thiel, a co-founder ...

item.title: Dr. Elliot McGucken's Spacetime Light Sculptures
item.description: Dr. Elliot McGucken, a fine art photographer and physicist, merges scientific theory with artistic vision through his 'Spacetime Light Cone Sculptures dx4/dt=ic' series. Inspired by Einstein's relativ...

item.title: Gareth Cattermole's Polaroid Captures Harry Styles Fans' Creativity and Community at Wembley
item.description: Gareth Cattermole, a photographer, captured the essence of Harry Styles’s fan community during his record-breaking Wembley Stadium concerts using a Polaroid camera. The photos focus on the creativity,...

item.title: Kiambu Well-Wisher Offers KSh 4m Plot to Help Elderly Grandma After Gikomba Fire
item.description: Eunice Njoki Gichungu, 93-year-old grandmother from Kiambu, received a KSh 4 million plot from a well-wisher after her kibanda was destroyed in the recent Gikomba Market fire. Her emotional video of c...

item.title: Addressing the skills gap through vocational reform and workplace integration

item.title: Legal battle over refugee status for Turkish man with violent criminal history
item.description: A Turkish man with a history of violent crimes faces renewed legal challenges after a Canadian immigration tribunal ruled his initial refugee claim was denied. The case centers on whether his 2010 con...

item.title: Silo Season Two Finale Reveals Major Plot Twists and Character Sacrifices
item.description: The Apple TV+ sci-fi series 'Silo' returns for its third season, with the second season's finale leaving key characters in peril. Juliette Nichols, played by Rebecca Ferguson, returns to Silo 18 after...

item.title: Keeping Pets Safe During the Fourth of July Fireworks
item.description: The Fourth of July celebrations often pose risks to pets, with a significant increase in lost animals being brought to shelters on July 5th. Elizabeth Oreck, senior manager of community programs for B...

item.title: Stage Collapse at Trump-Linked State Fair Raises Safety Concerns

item.title: India's $5.46 Billion Military Equipment Acquisition Approved
item.description: India's Defence Acquisition Council (DAC) has approved a $5.46 billion military procurement deal, including missiles, electronic warfare systems, and kamikaze drones. The estimated cost is INR520 bill...

item.description: Choplife Gaming, a leading gaming company, has been honored with the Presidential Taxpayers' Award by the Government of Tanzania. This recognition, presented on July 1, 2026, acknowledges the company'...

item.title: Ebonyi Education Experts Oppose Federal Plan to Scrap 6-3-3-4 System, Call for Better Implementation

item.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's Relationship Timeline and Impact on Modern Dating
item.description: The article explores the evolving relationship between Taylor Swift, a global pop icon, and Travis Kelce, an NFL star, following their engagement in August 2025. It traces their public love story, fro...

item.title: Female Teacher Killed in Bangsamoro Region Gun Attack
item.description: A female teacher in the Bangsamoro region was fatally shot in a targeted attack, marking another tragic incident in the area. The victim, identified as a local educator, was killed during a suspected ...

item.title: Gen Z Goliath Bradley Mtall Films Netflix Movie in South Africa
item.description: Bradley Mtall, known as the Gen Z Goliath, is currently in South Africa filming a Netflix movie. Behind-the-scenes photos shared on Instagram show a full crew, film equipment, and an arid outdoor loca...

item.title: ICSAN Emphasizes Role of Governance Professionals in Corporate and National Development

item.title: Winnipeg Treaty One proposes 6,000-seat arena to attract professional or junior sports teams
item.description: Winnipeg Treaty One, a local Indigenous group, is advocating for the construction of a 6,000-seat arena in Winnipeg to attract professional or junior sports teams. The proposal, reported on July 2, 20...
